note: Two follow-up fixes. (1) Explorer mute button now silences instantly. The previous toggle relied on stopMelody, which performs a 1.5-second linear gain ramp before disconnecting active oscillators — the user perceived it as 'mute does nothing'. js/sost-music.js gained silenceNow() exposed as window.nesSilenceNow / window.sostSilenceNow: cancelScheduledValues + setValueAtTime(0) on the master gain, plus a synchronous oscillator stop+disconnect. The mute branch in sost-explorer.html now calls nesSilenceNow first (snap to 0) and nesToggleMute after (persist muted=true to localStorage). (2) Latest Transactions Phase 2 was asking listtransfers for only 50 entries; the backend cap is 200. Bumped the request to 200 so older TRANSFERs (cf1a90138d, e1522b1b, 194e6626 etc., now ~110 blocks behind tip) reappear under the TRANSFERS filter without needing a backend reindex. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO node, NO miner. Force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to pick up the new JS.
